Hardware Component File

EMS3250_C011_0210_V1.0

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference EMS3250_C011_0210_V1.0_20200305T172041.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 18DA15F1
Receive ID 18DAF115
Functional Addr 15
Functional Name ECM_29

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "99",
    "supplier": "001",
    "soft": "C011",
    "version": "0210"
  }
]
